aboutUs.title: about us
aboutUs.subtitle: We seek to reduce student dropout rates in Colombia
aboutUs.paragraph1: This is our way of contributing to a country with more education and consequently more development.
aboutUs.paragraph2_start: Identify students with vulnerabilities and provide them with comprehensive support, through

statistic2.description: Socio-pedagogical and socio-vocational guidance counseling (ASP Y ASV)

statistic8.description: Students who receive a computer on loan or as a donation

donation.description: At the Foundation Antivirus for Dropout Prevention, we are a non-profit organization that seeks to reduce student dropout levels in Colombia, improve retention and graduation rates, this being our way of contributing to achieving a country with more education and consequently more development.
donation.monthly_payment: Allow the payment to be monthly according to the mentioned amount

banner.title: what we do
banner.alt_banner: Banner with the title 'what we do'

contentDA.title: Our Model
contentDA.subtitle: Data Analytics
contentDA.paragraph1: The Data Analytics area is based on a comprehensive and open-source solution for student retention supported by technology, where Machine Learning and Big Data are used to respond to early warnings of student dropout risk and analyze the root causes that produce it.
contentDA.paragraph2: In addition, through a web application, intervention cases are managed to act on the data and support is provided for proper adoption from the wellness area with expert consultations on retention.

commun.subtitle: COMMUNICATIONS
commun.paragraph_1: This area is made up of social communicators and graphic designers.
commun.paragraph_2: This team creates and promotes communication actions, adjusted to the characterization and built through the needs and segmentation of the students.
commun.paragraph_3: This area is responsible for disseminating information and creating audiovisual content and using technological means, platforms, and other interaction and information resources.
commun.paragraph_4: The Communication and Marketing area is also in charge of digital marketing and email marketing to the project's stakeholders, such as directors, teachers, students, and companies interested in the services provided by FATV.

qhfa.intervention_description: This is the foundation's field of action that aims to identify and understand the particularities of the sociocultural and socio-emotional context of students, to influence, transform and significantly impact their conditions and educational process, through tools and alternatives for socio-pedagogical support. The social team is composed of social workers and psychologists responsible for designing and implementing academic strengthening strategies, psycho-emotional and socio-pedagogical support. This area has the following social intervention lines:
qhfa.academic_description: Search for tutors and mentors willing to receive a modest hourly stipend and offer another voluntary hour. In this sense, once tutors are found, this area is responsible for creating appointments for one-on-one tutoring and thematic workshops for complementary class review and study groups.

support_list.mental_health: Supervising, guiding and attending to students with problems in their mental state and emotional health.
support_list.vocational_guidance: Providing guidance on vocational or family situations,
support_list.strengthen_skills: Helping to strengthen students' socio-emotional skills and self-esteem.
support_list.organize_workshops: Organizing workshops, meetings and focus groups to strengthen socio-emotional and vocational skills.

tutoring.title: Tutoring / Mentoring
tutoring.description: Academic tutoring is a personalized review space for those subjects that present the most difficulty.

levelUp.title: Level Up with Antivirus
levelUp.description: This is a strategy that seeks to openly support all students who are in a state of academic vulnerability and are looking to pass their courses.

studyGroups.title: Study Groups
studyGroups.description: This is a meeting space for small groups of students focused on reviewing specific subjects.

imageSection1.title: Itagüí Scholarship Event
imageSection1.description: An alliance created to support you

youtube_channel.title: Link / Youtube Channel
youtube_channel.description: It is a digital academic space with different subjects, available for viewing on Youtube.

consultorias.title: Services
consultorias.main_consulting_title: CONSULTING AND IMPLEMENTATION OF PROJECTS FOR RETENTION IN:
consultorias.description: We offer specialized services aimed at implementing, in collaboration with universities, schools, and bootcamps, strategies to ensure educational retention, graduation, and, consequently, the reduction of school dropout. We focus on the unique context of each university, school, or bootcamp and respect their particular pedagogical and administrative processes.

testimonials_content.description: The support and the people who provide it are very important because you feel confident and feel like you're learning something... The fact that they come with questions that don't force you but encourage you to give an answer has made me better prepared for my future or at least have a clearer plan for what I'm doing today for my future.
testimonials_content.author: - Samuel Durango Baena

testimonials_content.description: We've learned to know ourselves quite well. It has been a personal growth; I've learned to love myself, to know myself more deeply, to look at what I want for my life in a few years, and to know that I have made great progress. I have to be consistent with what I want to achieve and have fixed goals. In the future, I imagine myself as a great professional, having my own company or brand, or being independent.
testimonials_content.author: - Salomé Arango

testimonials_content.description: Honestly, before Antivirus arrived, I was very insecure about what I was going to study or what I was going to do with my life because nobody knows what will happen in the future because it's uncertain. But Antivirus came and little by little has been able to give us security, it has taught us that everything in life has a solution and our problems can become strengths for ourselves.
testimonials_content.author: - Estiwar Espinal

testimonials_content.description: Antivirus has done a wonderful job. Thanks to Antivirus, I've tried to let go of that fear of the future, it has calmed things down a lot. As 11th-grade students, we carry several responsibilities and we worry a lot about what will happen after school. What will I do? And Antivirus has helped us get to know ourselves a little more and know what I can dedicate myself to or which path to take.
testimonials_content.author: - Antonia Aristizábal

testimonials_content.description: The support seemed very pleasant to me; my biggest learning was in decision-making, understanding my emotions better, and thinking before acting. You helped me become more confident in the decisions I want to make in my life. What I liked the most were the talks, the methodology, and the topics; that enlightened us.
testimonials_content.author: - Matías González
